scope: Implement QoL automation audit improvements for support timing, wrapper-safe checks, site-options coverage, elapsed-slot efficiency scoring, and timestamp churn reduction.

live_automation_updates.change: Moved support start from 06:20 PT to 06:03 PT through automation_update.
Moved support start from Sunday 23:45 PT to Sunday 23:39 PT in local TOML because automation_update reported the app automation ID was missing.

validation: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-npm-script.ps1 check:automation:live passed for 30 QoL automations and 2 support automations.
powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/measure-automation-efficiency.ps1 -RepoRoot . -Days 30 ran and reported elapsed-slot attribution.
powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-npm-script.ps1 test passed with 7 tests.
powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-npm-script.ps1 check reached typecheck and then reported the local blocker: TypeScript compiler not found.

blockers.blocker: Local aggregate typecheck cannot pass until dependencies or a compiler path are available.
blockers.next_action: Run npm install in an environment with npm, or set TSC_CMD to a working tsc.cmd path.

automation_efficiency.notes: Cadence remains 30 QoL starts/day. Support jobs now use midpoint slots with explicit spacing validation; scorecard now ignores future/not-yet-elapsed QoL slots when reporting missing sessions.

self_improvement: Implemented the script/checker improvements directly and documented the support timing and scorecard behavior.
